What I do

Services

Clean, precise SolidWorks deliverables for mechanical and product design projects.

⬡
3D Part Modelling
Fully parametric SolidWorks parts, optimised for manufacturing or 3D printing.
⊞
Assembly Design
Multi-component assemblies with mates, motion constraints, and bill of materials.
◈
Product Concept CAD
Consumer, industrial, and mobility product concepts translated into 3D models.
≡
Technical Drawings
Manufacturing-ready 2D drawings with GD&T, tolerances, and proper annotations.

Portfolio

About

Who I Am

I'm Shreya Ade, a final-year Robotics & Automation Engineering student at Madras Institute of Technology, Anna University. I specialise in SolidWorks CAD design — building everything from detailed mechanical parts to full product assemblies.

My work spans robotics, industrial machinery, mobility products, and consumer goods. Every model I deliver is clean, parametric, and ready for the real world — whether that's a factory floor or a 3D printer.

Currently open to freelance CAD contracts via Upwork, Fiverr, or direct engagement.
